P0R04800: The dynamics of electron spins may play a role in neural processing and Psi-field interaction.

P0R04801: The RPM: Biochemical reactions generate Radical Pairs (RPs) whose entangled spins oscillate between Singlet (S) and Triplet (T) states. HRP=SSz+TTz+JST+... | Potential Roles: Magnetic Field Sensitivity (L6/L12 Coupling): The S-T interconversion rate is sensitive to weak magnetic fields, linking L1 to the Planetary/Gaian fields. | Metabolic Regulation: RPM may regulate ROS production in mitochondria. | Isotope Effects: The differential effects of isotopes (e.g., Lithium, Xenon) on consciousness may be mediated by their nuclear spins influencing RP dynamics.
